name: Bagel Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C) or use a toaster oven.
2. With a sharp knife, slice the bagel into very thin slices so that you can almost see through them (approximately 10 slices).
3. Place the slices on a baking sheet.
4. Lightly spray with cooking spray.
5. Sprinkle each slice lightly with seasoning (a little goes a long way) or leave plain.
6. Bake for 3 to 4 minutes until lightly browned, being careful not to overcook as they burn easily.
7. Break each slice into 4 chips.
